## Marvell Ships 5 Million Photonic Chips Into AI Data Centers

Concrete shipment volumes confirm MRVL's silicon photonics business is in volume production, strengthening the case that MRVL is a multi-vector AI infrastructure beneficiary — not just custom ASICs — with a durable and differentiated product line.

- MRVL has shipped 5 million photonic chips into AI data center deployments, per headline.
- Silicon photonics is a critical enabling technology for AI interconnect at scale; this shipment figure signals product traction beyond early design wins.
- Validates MRVL's positioning in the AI compute topology theme alongside its custom ASIC business.
- No customer names or revenue contribution specified in coverage.
